projects.name: cardmasters-ai-support
projects.gitDetail: ac4aab2 Merge pull request #1 from minit

wins: Dream Team agent identity system working — After 3 rounds of debugging, all 4 agents (Coach/Lebron/Bronny/Curry) now correctly load personality + rules via `workspace/AGENTS.md`. Root cause found: sub-agents only inject AGENTS.md from workspace, not SOUL.md from agentDir.

Comprehensive SOUL.md + AGENT.md audit — Coach (pm-agent) produced detailed cross-agent review with 9 priority fixes, covering handoff gaps, escalation protocols, quick-fix sync, integration testing gaps. Actionable and thorough.

tu-vi release closure (carried from 3/22) — Git commits landed: `d185acd0` (release docs + backend verification), `6974fff0` (/ask query-question compatibility + README refresh). All hard verification surfaces green.
problems: CEO violated own execution boundary — Mini Taisama (CEO) built retro template, coded HTML dashboard site, and created cron jobs manually instead of dispatching to Coach → Lebron/Bronny. Dream Team runbook explicitly says CEO does NOT do implementation.

Premature retro cron without valid flow — Created 23:59 retro cron that runs in isolated session with no access to agent feedback. Retro requires multi-agent ping-pong, not single-agent hallucination.

Sub-agent injection took 3 debugging rounds — 3 rounds × 4 agents × 2 spawns = ~24 wasted sub-agent calls before discovering `workspace/AGENTS.md` is the injection point, not `agentDir/AGENTS.md`. Should have read docs first.

actionItems.action: Kill premature retro cron jobs (23:59 + dashboard) and redesign retro flow: Coach initiates → agents ping each other → synthesize
Apply top 3 priority fixes from Coach's cross-agent audit: (a) Curry escalation protocol, (b) Bronny design handoff checklist, (c) Curry automation stance clarification
Complete Codex OAuth login — run `openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex` on Mac mini terminal directly (interactive TTY required)

annotations.label: Dream Team agent identity system working — After 3 rounds

lessons.text: Tiny task card giúp giảm loạn scope.
Scope phải freeze trước khi coding.
Curry nên test theo contract cố định, không test theo target đang đổi.
Retrieval tuning cần golden query set sớm.
Artifact-first handoff tốt hơn full-history forwarding.
Phase 1 phù hợp với Dream Team nếu triển khai như runtime guardrail vô hình.
Tool-output compaction hợp với Dream Team vì giảm noise/context bloat.
Artifact storage chỉ nên là phụ trợ tự động, không biến thành thủ tục.
Chunk budgets hợp nếu để rộng tay và checkpoint thưa.
Hai failure mode cần nhớ cho long-run: context truncation/compaction và runtime timeout.
Default operating modes: `Solo`, `Build`, `Release-critical`; `Build` là mode mặc định, `Release-critical` chỉ cho high-blast-radius work.
Codex/default coding rule: chỉ giao coding executor khi Coach đã freeze tiny task card; không ném vague product ask thẳng cho coding agent.
Token rule: không forward full history mặc định, không duplicate cross-role analysis, và không spam progress update nếu state chưa đổi.
Communication rule: prompt/update giữa Coach, Lebron, Curry phải gãy gọn, ngắn, on-point.
Dev retro: với coding slice phức tạp, freeze tiny DoD + response contract trước; Coach hand tiny spec + acceptance tests; Curry validate theo contract cố định.
Retrieval retro: tạo small golden query set trước khi tune parser/scorer/fallbacks.
QA retro: backend/UI contract change cần ít nhất 1 pinned API contract test và 1 representative fixture/render check.
Diagnosis retro: nếu chất lượng câu trả lời kém, phân loại miss theo `parser` vs `scorer` vs `corpus-quality` trước khi sửa code.

feedbackFeed.text: N/A — but Coach's audit identified Curry needs: escalation protocol, automation stance, re-test protocol, engagement criteria

weeklyInsight: 3 action items quá hạn chưa resolve. 4/4 core agents đang idle.
